methods.name: focused
methods.distribution: Increase one score by 2 and another by 1 from the background's three options

methods.name: balanced
methods.distribution: Increase all three background scores by 1 each

abilityScoreAssignment.description: User assigns the increases to specific abilities from background choices

choices.description: User choices for any options the species provides

abilityScoreValidation.rule: No single ability score can exceed 20 during character creation
abilityScoreValidation.check: sum of racial bonuses + background increases ≤ 20 per ability

choiceValidation.backgroundChoices: User must assign background increases only to the 3 abilities listed in background
choiceValidation.speciesChoices: User must make valid selections for any species options (size, spells, etc.)
choiceValidation.equipmentChoice: User must pick either equipment package A or B from background

implementationNotes.dynamicGeneration: System should load any background + any species and combine according to rules
implementationNotes.userInterface: Present background ability score choices, species options, equipment choices to user
implementationNotes.validation: Validate all user choices against rules before generating final character origin
implementationNotes.output: Generate complete character origin with all derived traits for use in character creation
